sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7795" key="a)naxalkeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναχαλκεύω</orth>, <sense id="n7795.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forge anew,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς πύλας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.29</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
